decision_reason: User approved one more discover retry focused on finding a low-error or no-error file-download cadence and recomputing ETA from that safe cadence. User-approved ETA ceiling for this branch: 72.0 hours. Notes: Approved to override the prior ETA stop once in order to map a safer file-download envelope..
improvement_hypotheses: Probe file downloads much more conservatively to find a cadence with no errors or only very low errors.
Keep metadata and file lanes separate and preserve exact 429 headers, timestamps, and inter-request spacing.
Recompute ETA only from the safer measured cadence and report whether that new ETA is still above the preferred threshold.
Do not start bulk downloading yet; this retry is for capacity characterization and ETA recalculation.
